name: long hallway
hints: There is a locked door here. You need keys to proceed.
The keys from the duffel bag unlock this door. EAST returns to the cavern.
UNLOCK DOOR with keys, then OPEN DOOR to proceed. EAST goes to the large cavern.
notes: Hallway with a locked door requiring keys (from the duffel bag). EAST leads to the large cavern (room 17). The locked door connects to the pit area.
